title: Basic JavaScript Function Composition
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Function Composition. Focus on implementing Function composition concept correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Function Composition
description: Create a function that uses Function composition concept and Pipe (left-to-right) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Function Composition Project
description: Build a small application that applies Function composition concept, Pipe (left-to-right), Compose (right-to-left) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Function Composition
description: The following code has bugs related to Function composition concept. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Function Composition
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Function composition concept and Pipe (left-to-right).
